headline: Citrix and HPE to Deepen Strategic Collaboration on Private Cloud and Virtualization Solutions
summary: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., June 17, 2026--Citrix, a Cloud Software Group company, today announced it plans to expand its strategic collaboration with HPE to private cloud and virtualization solutions. The companies intend to deepen their work across joint solution engineering, product integration, validation and go-to-market strategies, with an initial focus on delivering Citrix Desktop-as-a-Service (DaaS) with GreenLake by HPE for customers seeking on-premises and sovereign deployments.

raw.headline: Citrix and HPE to Deepen Strategic Collaboration on Private Cloud and Virtualization Solutions

headline: HPE Delivers Unified Agentic IT Operations With GreenLake and HPE Morpheus Software
summary: LAS VEGAS, June 17, 2026--HPE Discover Las Vegas 2026 – HPE (NYSE: HPE) today announced expanded capabilities across GreenLake to deliver unified operations for the agentic enterprise through innovations across agentic AIOps, private cloud, and software for AI infrastructure. Through GreenLake, HPE provides customers with a unified operating model that addresses rising virtualization costs, modernizes for emerging AI workloads, and simplifies operational complexity.

headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued After AI Networking Push
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is in focus after rolling out new AI focused networking products, deeper Juniper integration, and Nvidia powered AI Factory updates designed to simplify large scale AI deployments for enterprise customers. See our latest analysis for Hewlett Packard Enterprise. headline: Vultr Selects HPE and NVIDIA for Next-Generation AI Infrastructure for Cloud-Scale Data Centers
summary: LAS VEGAS, June 17, 2026--HPE Discover Las Vegas 2026--HPE (NYSE: HPE) today announced Vultr, the world’s largest privately held hyperscaler, has selected HPE and NVIDIA for large-scale AI datacenter deployments designed to support rapidly growing enterprise demand for private cloud and AI workloads.

headline: HPE Names Benchmark as Its Manufacturing Partner of the Year
summary: TEMPE, Ariz., June 17, 2026--Benchmark Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: BHE) today announced it has been named HPE’s Manufacturing Partner of the Year for 2026, recognizing Benchmark’s exemplary quality, cost, delivery performance, and customer service in helping HPE rapidly scale next-generation AI infrastructure.

headline: HPE (NYSE:HPE) Unveils AI Networking Security And Quantum Push
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) announced a new set of AI-driven networking, security, and quantum computing offerings. The company is integrating Juniper switches into its Mist platform for unified AI-native network control. HPE introduced agentic AIOps capabilities designed to support self-healing networks and AI-optimized switches. The company rolled out a unified SASE security platform aimed at large enterprise environments. HPE also expanded collaborations focused on hybrid...

headline: EigenQ and Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. Announce Definitive Business Combination Agreement to Create a Publicly Traded Quantum Technology Company
summary: EigenQ Inc. ("EigenQ" or the "Company"), a quantum technology company, and Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: SVAQ) ("SVAQ"), a publicly traded blank check company, announced today that they have entered into a definitive Business Combination Agreement ("Business Combination Agreement") that is expected to result in EigenQ becoming a publicly traded company.

headline: HPE (HPE) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift After Q2 Spurs Analyst Target Increases
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise is back in focus after a sharp reset in valuation views, with one fair value estimate moving from US$29.92 to US$64.13 per share based on refreshed assumptions. The shift lines up with more constructive Street commentary following Q2 results, where analysts are debating how much of the story rests on enterprise AI infrastructure, server and cloud momentum, and the balance between pricing and unit demand. In the sections that follow, you will see how this evolving...
